Large Loss Assessment

Complex multi-discipline investigations for catastrophic property failures

sendSubmit an Assignment

Response Time
97%

International
Coverage Area

Overview

Trinity Engineering's Large Loss division specializes in complex, high-value property damage investigations requiring multi-discipline expertise. Our team coordinates structural, mechanical, electrical, and fire investigation engineers to provide comprehensive forensic analysis for commercial properties, industrial facilities, and catastrophic events.

Request This Servicearrow_forward

Report Types Available

Preliminary Assessment

Rapid initial evaluation for claim reserving and emergency response decisions.

schedule48-72 Hours

Comprehensive Large Loss Report

Multi-discipline forensic investigation with detailed analysis and exhibits.

schedule14-21 Business Days

Expert Witness Package

Litigation-ready reporting with expert testimony preparation and supporting documentation.

scheduleCustom Timeline

Services & Solutions

Comprehensive capabilities delivered by licensed Professional Engineers

factory

Industrial Facilities

Forensic investigation of manufacturing plants, warehouses, and distribution centers.

business

Commercial Properties

Multi-story office buildings, retail centers, and mixed-use development investigations.

apartment

Multi-Family Housing

Comprehensive analysis of apartment complexes, condominiums, and assisted living facilities.

groups

Multi-Discipline Team

Coordinated response from structural, mechanical, electrical, and fire investigation experts.

emergency

CAT Response

Rapid deployment catastrophe response team for major weather events and disasters.

gavel

Litigation Support

Comprehensive expert witness services for high-stakes commercial litigation.
